mapper.select: SELECT r.*, p.product_name FROM receipts r LEFT JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY r.receipt_date DESC
SELECT r.*, p.product_name FROM receipts r LEFT JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id ORDER BY r.receipt_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT r.*, p.product_name FROM receipts r LEFT JOIN products p ON r.product_id = p.product_id WHERE r.po_id = #{poId} ORDER BY r.receipt_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO receipts (po_id, product_id, quantity, receipt_date) VALUES (#{poId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{receiptDate})
